chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. C.P No. D-734 of 2026 ____________________________________________________________ Dated Order with signature of Judge. ____________________________________________________________ Priority 1. For order on office objection 2. For hearing of CMA No.3085/2026 3. For hearing of main case 23.02.2026. Ms. Fauzia Rasheed, Advocate for the Petitioner Ms. Mehreen Ibrahim, D.A.G. --------------- Sardar Zafar Hussain, and Mr. Kahlid Mehmood Rajpar, Advocates file Vakalatnamas on behalf of the Respondent No.2, 3 & 4 respectively. They undertake that the assessment notes impugned by the Petitioner, available at (Annexure D/1 & D2 at Pages 55 & 57 of the Court file) will not be acted upon without issuance of a formal show-cause notice under Section 32 of the Customs Act and appropriate proceedings in due process of law. Learned counsel for the Petitioner is satisfied in that regard. Under the circumstances, the Petition stands disposed of accordingly in the foregoing terms. JUDGE JUDGE TariqAli/PS
